context: You are at a Spanish language exchange event in Madrid and meet a Spanish speaker named Carlos.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Hello! I am Carlos. What is your name?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Greet him and say your name (say 'Hello, I am...')

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Nice to meet you! Where are you from?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say where you are from (say 'I am from...')

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: How interesting! And why are you learning Spanish?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you are learning Spanish because you love the culture

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: That is great! How long have you been learning Spanish?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have been learning Spanish for six months
acceptedResponses: Hace seis meses que aprendo español

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: ¡Impresionante! Tu español es muy bueno. ¿Vives aquí en Madrid?
exchanges.translation: Impressive! Your Spanish is very good. Do you live here in Madrid?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say no, you are visiting for two weeks
acceptedResponses: No, estoy de visita por dos semanas
exchanges.hint: No, estoy de visita por dos semanas.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: ¡Qué bien! ¿Y tienes familia o amigos aquí en España?
exchanges.translation: How nice! And do you have family or friends here in Spain?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say no, but you are here visiting — then ask Carlos if he is from Madrid
acceptedResponses: No, no tengo familia aquí. ¿Eres de Madrid?

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Sí, soy madrileño de toda la vida. ¿Te gustaría intercambiar números para practicar juntos?
exchanges.translation: Yes, I have been from Madrid my whole life. Would you like to exchange numbers to practice together?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say yes, that would be great!

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Perfect! It was a pleasure to meet you. See you soon!

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say goodbye and that it was a pleasure to meet him too
